mapper.sql: SELECT * from (select t1.act_id,t1.appy_start_date,t1.appy_end_date,t1.qrcode,t1.check_flag,t1.m_status, t1.post_id, t1.act_type, t1.act_form, t1.fee, t1.longi, t1.lati,t1.location, t1.start_date, t1.start_time, t1.end_date, t1.end_time, t1.reg_setting, t1.contactphone, t1.sign_num, t1.create_user_id,t1.create_user_name,t1.sort,t1.member_limit,t1.join_limit,t1.fee_limit,t1.join_member_view,t1.btn_view,t1.share_cfg,t1.audt_cfg, t1.act_put,t1.crowd_qr,t1.is_recom, t2.title,t2.content,t2.cover_url,t2.tag,t2.sp_type from sns_act t1 left join sns_post t2 on t1.post_id = t2.post_id) ts
mapper.select: select t1.act_id,t1.appy_start_date,t1.appy_end_date,t1.qrcode,check_flag, t1.post_id, t1.act_type, t1.act_form, t1.fee, t1.longi, t1.lati,location, t1.start_date, t1.start_time, t1.end_date, t1.end_time, t1.reg_setting, t1.contactphone, t1.sign_num, t1.create_user_id,t1.create_user_name,t2.title,t2.content,t2.cover_url,t2.tag,t1.sort, t1.is_recom, t1.member_limit,t1.join_limit,t1.fee_limit,t1.join_member_view,t1.btn_view,t1.share_cfg,t1.audt_cfg,t1.act_put,t1.crowd_qr from sns_act t1 LEFT JOIN sns_post t2 on t1.post_id=t2.post_id where t1.act_id = #{id} and t2.status=0

select t1.act_id,t1.appy_start_date,t1.appy_end_date,t1.qrcode,check_flag, t1.post_id, t1.act_type, t1.act_form, t1.fee, t1.longi, t1.lati,location, t1.start_date, t1.start_time, t1.end_date, t1.end_time, t1.reg_setting, t1.contactphone, t1.sign_num, t1.create_user_id,t1.create_user_name,t2.title,t2.content,t2.cover_url,t2.tag,t1.sort, t1.is_recom, t1.member_limit,t1.join_limit,t1.fee_limit,t1.join_member_view,t1.btn_view,t1.share_cfg,t1.audt_cfg,t1.act_put,t1.crowd_qr from sns_act t1 LEFT JOIN sns_post t2 on t1.post_id=t2.post_id where t1.act_id = #{id} and t2.status=0
mapper.update:
update sns_act
post_id = #{postId}, act_type = #{actType}, act_form = #{actForm}, fee = #{fee}, lati = #{lati}, longi = #{longi}, location = #{location}, start_date = #{startDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_date = #{endDate}, end_time = #{endTime}, reg_setting = #{regSetting}, contactphone = #{contactphone}, sign_num = #{signNum}, m_status = #{mStatus}, sort = #{sort}, appy_start_date=#{appyStartDate}, appy_end_date=#{appyEndDate},
qrcode=#{qrcode}, check_flag=#{checkFlag},
member_limit=#{memberLimit}, join_limit=#{joinLimit}, fee_limit=#{feeLimit}, join_member_view=#{joinMemberView}, btn_view=#{btnView}, share_cfg=#{shareCfg}, audt_cfg=#{audtCfg}, act_put=#{actPut}, is_recom=#{isRecom}, crowd_qr=#{crowdQr},
where act_id = #{actId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sns_act
post_id, act_type, act_form, fee, lati, longi, location, start_date, start_time, end_date, end_time, reg_setting, contactphone, sign_num, m_status, create_user_id, appy_start_date, appy_end_date, sort, qrcode, check_flag,
member_limit, join_limit, fee_limit, join_member_view, btn_view, share_cfg, audt_cfg, act_put, is_recom, crowd_qr,
#{postId}, #{actType}, #{actForm}, #{fee}, #{lati}, #{longi}, #{location}, #{startDate}, #{startTime}, #{endDate}, #{endTime}, #{regSetting}, #{contactphone}, #{signNum}, #{mStatus}, #{createUserId}, #{appyStartDate}, #{appyEndDate}, #{sort}, #{qrcode}, #{checkFlag},
#{memberLimit}, #{joinLimit}, #{feeLimit}, #{joinMemberView}, #{btnView}, #{shareCfg}, #{audtCfg}, #{actPut}, #{isRecom}, #{crowdQr},
